title: Replace principal-based admin access with password authentication (WRAITH123)

requirements.text: Replace the backend's principal-based admin authorization system with a password-based system. The backend must store a hardcoded or settable admin password (initially 'WRAITH123'). Expose a query or update function `verifyAdminPassword(password: Text) : Bool` that returns true if the provided password matches. Remove or bypass the existing `isAdmin(caller)` principal check for admin panel access. Retain `getAdminList`, `addAdmin`, and `removeAdmin` functions but gate them behind password verification rather than principal checks.

quotes: Make it so the admin panel can be accessed by a password instead of a command and make the password WRAITH123

acceptanceCriteria: A `verifyAdminPassword(password: Text) : async Bool` function exists in the backend and returns true only when the input matches 'WRAITH123'.
Admin management functions (getAdminList, addAdmin, removeAdmin) no longer gate on caller principal; they are protected by password verification or are open for use after frontend password gate.
The password 'WRAITH123' is the accepted credential.

requirements.text: Replace the Internet Identity login requirement on the Admin Panel page with a password entry screen. When the user navigates to /admin, display a styled password input form (matching the WRAITH dark classified-ops theme) prompting for the access passphrase. On correct entry of 'WRAITH123' (verified via the backend `verifyAdminPassword` call), grant access to the AdminPanelContent component. On incorrect entry, display a styled 'ACCESS DENIED — INVALID PASSPHRASE' error. Do not require the user to be logged in via Internet Identity to access the admin panel.

quotes: Make it so the admin panel can be accessed by a password instead of a command and make the password WRAITH123

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin shows a password prompt screen instead of redirecting to Internet Identity login.
Entering 'WRAITH123' and submitting calls the backend `verifyAdminPassword` function and, on success, renders the AdminPanelContent.
Entering an incorrect password displays a styled 'ACCESS DENIED — INVALID PASSPHRASE' message without revealing the correct password.
The password prompt UI matches the WRAITH dark classified-ops theme (near-black background, amber/red accents, monospaced typography).
Successful password entry persists the authenticated state for the session so the user is not prompted again on re-render.

constraints: The password must be exactly 'WRAITH123' as specified by the user.
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui/ (immutable paths).
nonGoals: Adding Internet Identity or principal-based authentication as a fallback for admin access.
Allowing the admin password to be changed via the UI.
Encrypting or hashing the password on the backend (beyond what the user requested).
Changing any non-admin features or routes.
